privileged_info_summary: The task involves documenting physical exam findings in NOSH ChartingSystem (real open-source EHR system by Dr. Michael Chen). Patient data is synthetic, generated from Synthea (MITRE). All metadata claims are accurate: patient Robert Thompson (PID 99, DOB 07/22/1958) and encounter ID 200. Expected findings are standard medical terminology verified against Merck Manual and clinical documentation standards. Provider login is demo_provider with encounter chief complaint 'Routine health maintenance examination' for date-of-service = today. Task setup script creates test data via SQL.
